fact_nuggets.text: Status redirects here. For the move category, see status move. Status conditions (Japanese: abnormal condition), also referred to as status problems or status ailments, affect a Pokemon's ability to battle. There are two kinds of status conditions, non-volatile which last until healed, and volatile which last while a Pokemon is in battle. Having Pokrus and being fainted are displayed identically to non-volatile status conditions but are not officially considered such.
